inputs.fcf_source: Marvin floor $0.55 (FY2025 OCF $391M less est. capex $320M, 172.6M shares) blended 50% with normalized recovery $1.35 [Assumption] as wildfire cash burden eases
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 trough owner cash ~$0.41-0.64/sh; base uses mid-cycle utility cash once Maui liabilities and dividend path clarify. Bank stake sold Dec 2024 (HK Q1 2025).

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Hawaii PUC rate-base growth and wildfire settlement cash relief; EPS trough $0.71 FY2025 vs recovery toward allowed ROE.
growth_explanation.years_6_7: Regulated utility growth cap; dividend reinstatement lifts total return.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025; HK Q1 2025 HE section (context); [Assumption] on normalized cash

items: Registry CIK 354707 is HEICO; filings in folder are Hawaiian Electric (CIK 0000046207). Fix download config.
Normalized owner cash $1.35/sh is assumption until post-wildfire run-rate disclosed

paths.label: Catalyst: dividend reinstatement
paths.notes: HK context: recovery + yield on cost; not in Lawrence FCF0 [Assumption]
paths.weight_why: Capped catalyst; not Lawrence operating base.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
